creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 154276
svn diff for comms/comserv

I have been working with this, and hope to
add X10 feature, and include USB support.
What's new:
pet CLANG; still 2 warnings, but CLANG doesn't like FreeBSD's
version of sys/socket.h. There's still a lot of churn with
our version of CLANG. So I'll wait to overcome that last
warning.

Makefile -- bumps PORTVERSION, changes MASTER_SITES,
adds MAINTAINER, trims COMMENT,
removes unnecessary REINPLACE_CMD

distinfo updates to reflect new version && archive format

pkg-descr - adds WWW

That's it!

Please see QA LOG file, and svn diff, attached.

Thanks!

--Chris
